articles.title: BEZOS SELLS $2 BILLION WORTH OF AMAZON SHARES
articles.summary: New Miami resident Jeff Bezos sold nearly 12 million Amazon shares for a total of more than $2 billion in his first stock sale since 2021. Where’s he planning to invest that money?

articles.title: THE SUDDEN REPRICING OF STARTUPS IN EARLY 2024
articles.summary: New public market data reveals software companies leveraging AI are achieving significantly higher trading multiples and growth projections than non-AI peers – a valuation gap likely to permeate private markets in 2023-2024.

articles.title: NVIDIA IS NOW WORTH AS MUCH AS THE ENTIRE CHINESE STOCK MARKET
articles.summary: Thanks to the AI boom, NVIDIA's market cap has reached $1.7 trillion, equivalent to the combined market cap of all Chinese firms listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

articles.title: HOW GAMMA ACQUIRED 10 MILLION USERS IN 9 MONTHS
articles.summary: Grant Lee, the founder of Gamma, recounts scaling from 0 to 10 million users in just 9 months. In this article, he shares 8 keys to their massive growth detailing the scramble to handle hockey stick adoption while maintaining positive cash flow.

articles.title: HOW TO HAVE AN EFFECTIVE 1:1
articles.summary: Start with the question “How are you?” and simply listen to the response. You’ll be able to get a read on what’s bothering them, allowing you to bucket the response into updates, events, or disasters and then plan the rest of the time together accordingly.

articles.title: 7 THINGS TO DO WHEN YOU’RE STRUGGLING
articles.summary: Building a startup is hard, and often you’ll feel like you’re in a bit of a rut. Here are some simple things to consider deploying in order to get yourself back in the fight.

articles.title: ANIMSTATS (PRODUCT)
articles.summary: Transform your stats into captivating animated GIFs.

articles.title: THE STATE OF REMOTE WORK IN 2024
articles.summary: Are RTO policies working? According to this report, the answer is no. Only 16% of surveyed organizations remain exclusively in office, highlighting a substantial shift towards flexible work models.

articles.title: INSIDE OPENAI (68 MINUTE PODCAST)
articles.summary: Ever wondered how OpenAI is able to innovate and build at such a fast pace? In this podcast, Logan Kilpatrick, OpenAI's head of developer relations, discusses OpenAI's unique culture, the importance of high agency and urgency, and OpenAI's decision-making framework for launching products.

articles.title: THE DATA REVOLUTION IN VENTURE CAPITAL
articles.summary: Over 75% of public market trades (AUM of $1T+) are now driven by data-driven algorithms, a revolution initiated by hedge funds in the 90s. Today, that data-driven approach is rapidly infiltrating venture capital, with projections indicating that over 75% of VC deal reviews will involve AI and data analytics by 2025, transforming how investments are sourced, evaluated, and managed.

articles.title: 3 MISTAKES FOUNDERS MAKE
articles.summary: Pivots, do they pay off? Jyoti Bansal, founder of AppDynamics (sold for $3.7B) details the three biggest mistakes he made that hindered product-market fit.

articles.title: HOW TO DOUBLE CONVERSION ON YOUR HOME PAGE
articles.summary: This step-by-step framework helps you convert website traffic by writing sticky copy that grabs attention.

articles.title: HOW TO THINK ABOUT RAISING VENTURE CAPITAL FOR YOUR STARTUP
articles.summary: Here’s a 5-part thread on how playing the long game, shaping your vision, and building leverage lets you seize control of your startup's capital strategy.
